calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Aug-23-2004 Text Ruling

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-18-2004 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE HELD;ACTION SETTLED;TRIAL DATE VACATED;JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO STIPULATION SIGNED AND FILED THIS DATE. PLTF TO HAVE JUDGMENT FOR IMMEDIATE POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES AT 459 TURK ST., #224, SAN FRANCISCO, CA. RENTAL AGREEMENT DECLARED FORFEITED. AN IMMEDIATE WRIT OF POSSESSION FOR THE ABOVE PREMISES.AND PLTF WILL DEPOSIT EVICTION FEES WITH SHERIFF OF SF. HOWEVER, PLTF WILL STAY EXECUTION OF THIS WRIT ON CONDITION THAT DEFTS VACATE PREMISES ON OR BEFORE 5PM ON 9-10-04. IF DEFT DOES NOT VACATE BY THEN, WRIT WILL BE EXECUTED IMMEDIATELY WITH NO FURTHER STAY OF EXECUTION.PLTF WILL HAVE JUDGMENT FOR $0. IF DEFT DOES NOT VACATE BY ABOVE DATE AND TIME, PLTF WILL HAVE AN AMENDED JUDGMENT FOR UNPAID BACK RENT FOR $972.00 AND UD FEES OF $15.43 PER DAY FROM 8-1-04 THROUGH 9-10-04, WITH COSTS OF $240.30; AND AF OF $0. TOTAL AMENDED JUDGMENT WOULD BE $1779.99. (FOR FURTHER TERMS, PLEASE SEE STIP AND ORDER ON FILE.) PLTF CSL:ARNOLD WALTER EVJE,ESQ.;DEFT IN PRO PER;JUDGE PRO TEM:JASON STEIN;CLERK-BBSURRATT;NOT REPORTED. (DEPT. 218)
